1.21.0.en: Robustness: pending-create rejections logged once + rethrown. getLocalIp deprioritises Docker-bridge IPs (172.17/172.18) — mDNS no longer advertises a container address.
1.21.0.de: Robustheit: Pending-Create-Rejections einmalig geloggt + rethrown. getLocalIp deprioritisiert Docker-Bridge-IPs (172.17/172.18) — mDNS broadcastet keine Container-Adresse mehr.
1.21.0.ru: Robustness: pending-create rejections теперь логируются один раз и rethrown. Plus: getLocalIp deprioritises Docker-bridge IPs (172.17/172.18) — mDNS не advertise unreachable container address.
1.21.0.pt: Robustness: pending-create rejections agora logadas uma vez e rethrown. Plus: getLocalIp despioriza IPs Docker-bridge (172.17/172.18) — mDNS nao anuncia endereco de container inalcancavel.
1.21.0.nl: Robuustheid: pending-create rejections worden nu eenmalig gelogd en rethrown. Plus: getLocalIp deprioriteert Docker-bridge IPs (172.17/172.18) — mDNS adverteert geen onbereikbaar container adres meer.
1.21.0.fr: Robustesse : pending-create rejections loguees une fois et rethrown. Plus : getLocalIp depriorise les IPs Docker-bridge (172.17/172.18) — mDNS n'annonce plus d'adresse container inaccessible.
1.21.0.it: Robustezza: pending-create rejections loggate una volta e rethrown. Plus: getLocalIp depriorizza IP Docker-bridge (172.17/172.18) — mDNS non annuncia indirizzi container irraggiungibili.
1.21.0.es: Robustez: pending-create rejections loggeadas una vez y rethrown. Plus: getLocalIp despioriza IPs Docker-bridge (172.17/172.18) — mDNS no anuncia direcciones de container inaccesibles.
1.21.0.pl: Niezawodnosc: pending-create rejections logowane raz i rethrown. Plus: getLocalIp depriorytetuje IP Docker-bridge (172.17/172.18) — mDNS nie ogłasza nieosiagalnego adresu kontenera.
1.21.0.uk: Надійність: pending-create rejections логуються один раз і rethrown. Plus: getLocalIp деприоритизує Docker-bridge IPs (172.17/172.18) — mDNS не advertise unreachable container address.
1.21.0.zh-cn: 稳健性：pending 创建的拒绝现在只记录一次并重新抛出。另：getLocalIp 降低 Docker 桥接地址（172.17/172.18）的优先级 — mDNS 不再广播 LAN 无法访问的容器地址。

1.20.0.en: Internal cleanup: 3 helpers (buildDropdownStates, parseAdapterStateId, safeGetState) extracted into coerce.ts — client-registry + global-config share them instead of duplicating.
1.20.0.de: Interne Aufräumung: 3 Helpers (buildDropdownStates, parseAdapterStateId, safeGetState) nach coerce.ts extrahiert — client-registry + global-config teilen sie sich.
1.20.0.ru: Внутренняя уборка: 3 helpers (buildDropdownStates, parseAdapterStateId, safeGetState) вынесены в coerce.ts — client-registry и global-config делят implementation.
1.20.0.pt: Limpeza interna: 3 helpers (buildDropdownStates, parseAdapterStateId, safeGetState) extraidos para coerce.ts — client-registry e global-config compartilham a implementacao.
1.20.0.nl: Interne opruiming: 3 helpers (buildDropdownStates, parseAdapterStateId, safeGetState) naar coerce.ts — client-registry en global-config delen de implementatie.
1.20.0.fr: Nettoyage interne : 3 helpers (buildDropdownStates, parseAdapterStateId, safeGetState) extraits vers coerce.ts — client-registry et global-config partagent l'implementation.
1.20.0.it: Pulizia interna: 3 helpers (buildDropdownStates, parseAdapterStateId, safeGetState) estratti in coerce.ts — client-registry e global-config condividono l'implementazione.
1.20.0.es: Limpieza interna: 3 helpers (buildDropdownStates, parseAdapterStateId, safeGetState) extraidos a coerce.ts — client-registry y global-config comparten la implementacion.
1.20.0.pl: Wewnetrzne sprzatanie: 3 helpers (buildDropdownStates, parseAdapterStateId, safeGetState) przeniesione do coerce.ts — client-registry i global-config wspoldzielca implementacje.
1.20.0.uk: Внутрішнє прибирання: 3 helpers (buildDropdownStates, parseAdapterStateId, safeGetState) винесено в coerce.ts — client-registry та global-config ділять implementation.
1.20.0.zh-cn: 内部清理：3 个辅助函数（buildDropdownStates、parseAdapterStateId、safeGetState）提取到 coerce.ts — client-registry 和 global-config 共享实现，不再重复。

1.19.1.en: Test coverage: 7 new unit tests for v1.19.0 features — seedLastSeen path + per-IP burst-detection (4 cases: no-warn-under-3, warn-on-4th, no-double-warn, per-IP-independent, FIFO-cap).
1.19.1.de: Test-Coverage: 7 neue Unit-Tests für v1.19.0-Features — seedLastSeen-Pfad + Per-IP-Burst-Erkennung (4 Cases: kein-warn-unter-3, warn-bei-4-tem, kein-double-warn, per-IP-unabhängig, FIFO-cap).
1.19.1.ru: Test coverage: 7 новых unit-tests для v1.19.0 features — seedLastSeen path + per-IP burst-detection (4 cases).
1.19.1.pt: Test coverage: 7 novos unit tests para features de v1.19.0 — caminho seedLastSeen + deteccao de burst per-IP (4 casos).
1.19.1.nl: Test coverage: 7 nieuwe unit tests voor v1.19.0 features — seedLastSeen pad + per-IP burst-detectie (4 cases).
1.19.1.fr: Test coverage : 7 nouveaux unit tests pour les features v1.19.0 — chemin seedLastSeen + detection burst par IP (4 cas).
1.19.1.it: Test coverage: 7 nuovi unit test per le feature v1.19.0 — percorso seedLastSeen + rilevamento burst per IP (4 casi).
1.19.1.es: Test coverage: 7 nuevos unit tests para features de v1.19.0 — ruta seedLastSeen + deteccion burst per-IP (4 casos).
1.19.1.pl: Test coverage: 7 nowych unit tests dla funkcji v1.19.0 — sciezka seedLastSeen + detekcja burst per-IP (4 cases).
1.19.1.uk: Test coverage: 7 нових unit-тестів для v1.19.0 features — seedLastSeen path + per-IP burst-detection (4 cases).
1.19.1.zh-cn: 测试覆盖：v1.19.0 特性新增 7 个单元测试 — seedLastSeen 路径 + 按 IP 突发检测（4 个用例）。

1.19.0.en: Diagnostics: per-IP burst-detection — display creating >3 clients in <1h (broken cookie) gets one warn with cause. Plus: README single-instance-per-host hint.
1.19.0.de: Diagnose: Per-IP-Burst-Erkennung — Display mit >3 Clients in <1h (kaputter Cookie) bekommt einen warn mit Ursache. Plus: README Single-Instance-pro-Host-Hinweis.
1.19.0.ru: Диагностика: per-IP burst-detection — display с >3 clients в <1h (broken cookie) получает warn с причиной. Plus: README single-instance-per-host hint.
1.19.0.pt: Diagnostico: burst-detection per-IP — display com >3 clients em <1h (cookie quebrado) recebe warn. Plus: README single-instance-per-host hint.
1.19.0.nl: Diagnostiek: per-IP burst-detectie — display met >3 clients in <1u (kapotte cookie) krijgt warn. Plus: README single-instance-per-host hint.
1.19.0.fr: Diagnostic : detection burst par IP — si un display cree >3 clients en <1h (cookie non persistant), un warn explique. Plus : README clarifie single-instance-par-host, chemin lastSeen consolide.
1.19.0.it: Diagnostica: rilevamento burst per IP — se un display crea >3 client in <1h (cookie non persistente), un warn spiega la causa. Plus: README single-instance-per-host, percorso lastSeen consolidato.
1.19.0.es: Diagnostico: deteccion burst per-IP — si un display crea >3 clients en <1h (cookie no persistente), un warn explica la causa. Plus: README single-instance-per-host, ruta lastSeen consolidada.
1.19.0.pl: Diagnostyka: detekcja burst per-IP — jesli display tworzy >3 clients w <1h (cookie nie utrzymuje sie), warn wyjasnia przyczyne. Plus: README single-instance-per-host, sciezka lastSeen skonsolidowana.
1.19.0.uk: Діагностика: per-IP burst-detection — якщо display створює >3 clients за <1h (cookie не зберігається), warn пояснює причину. Plus: README single-instance-per-host, шлях lastSeen консолідовано.
1.19.0.zh-cn: 诊断：按 IP 突发检测 — 显示器在 1 小时内创建 >3 个客户端（Cookie 未持久化）时，单条 warn 给出原因。另：README 提示每主机单实例，lastSeen 更新路径合并。

1.18.0.en: Logging hygiene: 'Invalid credentials' downgraded to debug after 5 lockout-failures (warn-floods stop). Plus: server-stop errors no longer logged twice, mode-rejection on UI-echo is debug not warn.
1.18.0.de: Logging-Hygiene: 'Invalid credentials' nach 5 Lockout-Fails auf debug. Plus: Stop-Fehler nicht mehr doppelt geloggt, mode-Rejection bei UI-Echo ist debug.
1.18.0.ru: Logging hygiene: 'Invalid credentials' понижается до debug после 5 lockout-failures (warn-floods прекращаются). Plus: server-stop errors не логируются дважды, mode-rejection на UI-echo — debug.
1.18.0.pt: Logging hygiene: 'Invalid credentials' reduzido a debug apos 5 lockout-failures (warn-floods param). Plus: server-stop errors nao logados duas vezes, mode-rejection em UI-echo e debug.
1.18.0.nl: Logging hygiene: 'Invalid credentials' op debug na 5 lockout-failures (warn-floods stoppen). Plus: server-stop fouten niet meer dubbel gelogd, mode-rejection bij UI-echo is debug.
1.18.0.fr: Logging hygiene : 'Invalid credentials' a debug apres 5 lockout-failures (warn-floods arretes). Plus : erreurs server-stop plus loguees deux fois, mode-rejection sur UI-echo est debug.
1.18.0.it: Logging hygiene: 'Invalid credentials' a debug dopo 5 lockout-failures (warn-flood si fermano). Plus: errori server-stop non loggati piu due volte, mode-rejection su UI-echo e debug.
1.18.0.es: Logging hygiene: 'Invalid credentials' a debug tras 5 lockout-failures (warn-floods paran). Plus: errores server-stop no logueados dos veces, mode-rejection en UI-echo es debug.
1.18.0.pl: Logging hygiene: 'Invalid credentials' na debug po 5 lockout-failures (warn-floods sie zatrzymuja). Plus: bledy server-stop nie logowane dwa razy, mode-rejection na UI-echo to debug.
1.18.0.uk: Logging hygiene: 'Invalid credentials' на debug після 5 lockout-failures (warn-floods зупиняються). Plus: server-stop errors не логуються двічі, mode-rejection на UI-echo — debug.
1.18.0.zh-cn: 日志清理：5 次锁定失败后 'Invalid credentials' 降为 debug（warn 洪水停止）。另：服务器停止错误不再重复记录，UI 回响的 mode-rejection 改为 debug。

1.17.0.en: Security: pendingByIp uses IP+UA-hash bucket — NAT-co-located displays no longer share cookie/token. discovery_info uses bind-address. VIS discovery iterates all web.* instances.
1.17.0.de: Sicherheit: pendingByIp nutzt IP+UA-Hash-Bucket — NAT-co-located Displays teilen kein Cookie/Token mehr. discovery_info nutzt bind-address. VIS-Discovery iteriert alle web.*-Instances.
1.17.0.ru: Безопасность: pendingByIp использует IP+UA-hash bucket — NAT-co-located displays не делят cookie/token. discovery_info использует bind-address. VIS discovery итерирует все web.*.
1.17.0.pt: Seguranca: pendingByIp usa bucket IP+UA-hash — displays NAT-co-located nao compartilham cookie/token. discovery_info usa bind-address. VIS discovery itera todas web.*.
1.17.0.nl: Beveiliging: pendingByIp gebruikt IP+UA-hash bucket — twee displays achter NAT delen geen cookie/token. discovery_info gebruikt bind-address. Plus: VIS discovery itereert alle web.* instances.
1.17.0.fr: Securite : pendingByIp utilise bucket IP+UA-hash — 2 displays NAT ne partagent plus cookie/token. discovery_info utilise bind-address. Plus : VIS discovery itere toutes web.*.
1.17.0.it: Sicurezza: pendingByIp usa bucket IP+UA-hash — due display dietro NAT non condividono cookie/token. discovery_info usa bind-address. Plus: VIS discovery itera tutte le istanze web.*.
1.17.0.es: Seguridad: pendingByIp usa bucket IP+UA-hash — dos displays detras de NAT no comparten cookie/token. discovery_info usa bind-address. Plus: VIS discovery itera todas las instancias web.*.
1.17.0.pl: Bezpieczenstwo: pendingByIp uzywa bucket IP+UA-hash — dwa displays za NAT nie wspoldzielca cookie/token. discovery_info uzywa bind-address. Plus: VIS discovery iteruje wszystkie web.* instances.
1.17.0.uk: Безпека: pendingByIp використовує bucket IP+UA-hash — два displays за NAT не ділять cookie/token. discovery_info використовує bind-address. Plus: VIS discovery ітерує всі web.* instances.
1.17.0.zh-cn: 安全：pendingByIp 改用 IP+UA-hash 桶 — NAT 后的两个显示器不再共享 cookie/token。discovery_info 使用绑定地址（而非客户端可控的 Host 头）。另：VIS 发现遍历所有 web.* 实例（之前仅 web.0）。

1.16.0.en: Security: credentials compare via SHA-256 digest (no length-leak). Plus: loopback IPs hidden from landing page, mDNS-disabled has config hint.
1.16.0.de: Sicherheit: Credentials-Vergleich via SHA-256-Digest (kein Längen-Leak). Plus: Loopback-IPs nicht in Landing-Page, mDNS-disabled mit Config-Hinweis.
1.16.0.ru: Безопасность: credentials compare via SHA-256 digest (no length-leak). Plus: loopback IPs скрыты на landing page, mDNS-disabled с config hint.
1.16.0.pt: Seguranca: comparacao de credenciais via SHA-256 digest (sem length-leak por response timing). Plus: IPs loopback ocultos da landing page, mDNS-disabled tem config hint, README upgrading ate v1.15.x.
1.16.0.nl: Beveiliging: credentials-vergelijking via SHA-256 digest (geen length-leak via response timing). Plus: loopback IPs verborgen op landing page, mDNS-disabled heeft config hint.
1.16.0.fr: Securite : comparaison des credentials via SHA-256 digest (pas de length-leak via response timing). Plus : IPs loopback cachees de la landing page, mDNS-disabled a config hint.
1.16.0.it: Sicurezza: confronto credenziali via SHA-256 digest (no length-leak via response timing). Plus: IP loopback nascosti dalla landing page, mDNS-disabled ha config hint.
1.16.0.es: Seguridad: comparacion de credenciales via SHA-256 digest (sin length-leak via response timing). Plus: IPs loopback ocultos en la landing page, mDNS-disabled tiene config hint.
1.16.0.pl: Bezpieczenstwo: porownanie credentials via SHA-256 digest (bez length-leak przez response timing). Plus: loopback IPs ukryte na landing page, mDNS-disabled ma config hint.
1.16.0.uk: Безпека: порівняння credentials через SHA-256 digest (без length-leak через response timing). Plus: loopback IPs приховані на landing page, mDNS-disabled має config hint.
1.16.0.zh-cn: 安全：凭证比较改为 SHA-256 摘要比较（不再通过响应时序泄漏长度信息）。另：着陆页隐藏 loopback IP，mDNS 关闭时 Config 表有提示，README upgrading 覆盖到 v1.15.x。

desc.en: Emulates a minimal Home Assistant server so devices expecting a Home Assistant dashboard can display any custom web URL.
desc.de: Emuliert einen minimalen Home Assistant Server, sodass Geräte mit Home-Assistant-Dashboard-Unterstützung beliebige Web-URLs anzeigen können.
desc.ru: Эмулирует минимальный сервер Home Assistant, чтобы устройства, ожидающие панель управления Home Assistant, могли отображать любой пользовательский URL.
desc.pt: Emula um servidor Home Assistant mínimo para que dispositivos que esperam um painel do Home Assistant possam exibir qualquer URL web personalizado.
desc.nl: Emuleert een minimale Home Assistant server zodat apparaten die een Home Assistant dashboard verwachten elke aangepaste web-URL kunnen weergeven.
desc.fr: Émule un serveur Home Assistant minimal pour que les appareils attendant un tableau de bord Home Assistant puissent afficher n'importe quelle URL web personnalisée.
desc.it: Emula un server Home Assistant minimale in modo che i dispositivi che si aspettano una dashboard Home Assistant possano visualizzare qualsiasi URL web personalizzato.
desc.es: Emula un servidor Home Assistant mínimo para que los dispositivos que esperan un panel de Home Assistant puedan mostrar cualquier URL web personalizada.
desc.pl: Emuluje minimalny serwer Home Assistant, dzięki czemu urządzenia oczekujące pulpitu nawigacyjnego Home Assistant mogą wyświetlać dowolny niestandardowy adres URL.
desc.uk: Емулює мінімальний сервер Home Assistant, щоб пристрої, що очікують панель Home Assistant, могли відображати будь-яку користувацьку URL-адресу.
desc.zh-cn: 模拟一个最小的Home Assistant服务器，使期望Home Assistant仪表板的设备能够显示任何自定义网址。

common.name: Apply global URL to all clients
HA-server UUID (stable across restarts)
common.desc: Persistent UUID broadcast via mDNS and /api/discovery_info. Generated once on first start and re-used across restarts so HA-Clients don't treat each restart as a new server (which would invalidate cached identity, force re-onboarding and drop tokens).

common.name: Refresh URL discovery
common.desc: Write true to re-scan the broker for VIS/VIS-2 projects, Admin tiles and other discovered URLs. Useful after creating a new VIS view without restarting the adapter.
